mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND POST_IS_DELETED = 0) AS postCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND COMMENT_IS_DELETED = 0) AS commentCount, ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL JOIN TBL_POST TP ON TPL.POST_ID = TP.ID WHERE TP.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TP.POST_IS_DELETED = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMMENT_LIKE TCL JOIN TBL_COMMENT TC ON TCL.COMMENT_ID = TC.ID WHERE TC.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TC.COMMENT_IS_DELETED = 0)) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) AS bookmarkCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_FOLLOW WHERE FOLLOWER_ID = #{userId}) AS followingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_FOLLOW WHERE FOLLOWING_ID = #{userId}) AS followerCount FROM DUAL

SELECT TP.ID AS id, TP.POST_TITLE AS postTitle, TP.POST_TAG AS postTag, TP.POST_READ_COUNT AS postReadCount, TP.POST_CREATE_AT AS postCreateAt, NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL WHERE TPL.POST_ID = TP.ID ), 0) AS likeCount FROM TBL_POST TP WHERE TP.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TP.POST_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY TP.ID DESC

SELECT TP.ID AS id, TP.POST_TITLE AS postTitle, TP.POST_TAG AS postTag, TP.POST_READ_COUNT AS postReadCount, TP.POST_CREATE_AT AS postCreateAt, TU.USER_NAME AS userName, TU.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL2 WHERE TPL2.POST_ID = TP.ID ), 0) AS likeCount FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL JOIN TBL_POST TP ON TPL.POST_ID = TP.ID JOIN TBL_USER TU ON TP.USER_ID = TU.ID WHERE TPL.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TP.POST_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY TPL.ID DESC

SELECT TU.ID AS id, TU.USER_NAME AS userName, TU.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, TU.USER_PROFILE AS userProfile FROM TBL_FOLLOW TF JOIN TBL_USER TU ON TF.FOLLOWING_ID = TU.ID WHERE TF.FOLLOWER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TF.ID DESC

SELECT TU.ID AS id, TU.USER_NAME AS userName, TU.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, TU.USER_PROFILE AS userProfile FROM TBL_FOLLOW TF JOIN TBL_USER TU ON TF.FOLLOWER_ID = TU.ID WHERE TF.FOLLOWING_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TF.ID DESC
SELECT USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE FROM TBL_USER_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE DESC

SELECT TES.ID AS id, TE.EDU_TITLE AS eduTitle, CASE WHEN NVL(TES.EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(TES.EDU_START_COMPLETED_COUNT / TES.EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT * 100) END AS progress FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY TES.EDU_START_AT DESC, TES.ID DESC

SELECT TU.ID AS id, TU.USER_EMAIL AS userEmail, TU.USER_NAME AS userName, TU.USER_PHONE_NUM AS userPhoneNum, TU.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, TU.USER_PROFILE AS userProfile, TU.USER_INTRO AS userIntro, TU.USER_JOB AS userJob, TU.USER_ADDRESS AS userAddress, TU.USER_EXP AS userExp, TU.USER_CREATE_AT AS userCreateAt, TU.USER_ROLE AS userRole, TU.USER_EMAIL_CHANGED_AT AS userEmailChangedAt, CASE WHEN TSU.ID IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(TSU.SOCIAL_USER_PROVIDER) IN ('GOOGLE', 'KAKAO', 'NAVER') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS socialUser, NVL(TSU.SOCIAL_USER_PROVIDER, 'LOCAL') AS socialMemberProvider FROM TBL_USER TU LEFT JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_USER TSU ON TU.ID = TSU.USER_ID WHERE TU.ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM TBL_SOCIAL_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND UPPER(SOCIAL_USER_PROVIDER) IN ('GOOGLE', 'KAKAO', 'NAVER')
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_USER SET USER_NAME = #{requestDTO.userName}, USER_NICKNAME = #{requestDTO.userNickname}, USER_INTRO = #{requestDTO.userIntro}, USER_JOB = #{requestDTO.userJob}, USER_ADDRESS = #{requestDTO.userAddress} WHERE ID = #{userId}

UPDATE TBL_USER SET USER_EMAIL = #{requestDTO.userEmail}, USER_PHONE_NUM = #{requestDTO.userPhoneNum}, USER_EMAIL_CHANGED_AT = CASE WHEN USER_EMAIL != #{requestDTO.userEmail} THEN SYSDATE ELSE USER_EMAIL_CHANGED_AT END WHERE ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER_WITHDRAW.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER_WITHDRAW (ID, USER_ID, USER_WITHDRAW_REASON, USER_WITHDRAW_DETAIL) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{userWithdrawReason}, #{userWithdrawDetail})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM TBL_COMMENT START WITH USER_ID = #{userId} OR POST_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM TBL_POST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) CONNECT BY PRIOR ID = COMMENT_ID )
DELETE FROM TBL_POST_FILE WHERE POST_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM TBL_POST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})
DELETE FROM TBL_POST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_TODAY_WORD_RESULT WHERE TODAY_WORD_DETAIL_ID IN ( SELECT TWD.ID FROM TBL_TODAY_WORD_DETAIL TWD JOIN TBL_TODAY_WORD TW ON TWD.TODAY_WORD_ID = TW.ID WHERE TW.USER_ID = #{userId} )
DELETE FROM TBL_TODAY_WORD_DETAIL WHERE TODAY_WORD_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM TBL_TODAY_WORD WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})
DELETE FROM TBL_TODAY_WORD WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT_DETAIL WHERE QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})
DELETE FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_WORD_STUDY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_EDU_START WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_EDU_CERT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_USER_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_CERT_RENEW WHERE TEST_RESULT_ID IN ( SELECT TR.ID FROM TBL_TEST_RESULT TR JOIN TBL_TEST_APPLY TA ON TR.TEST_APPLY_ID = TA.ID WHERE TA.USER_ID = #{userId} )
DELETE FROM TBL_TEST_RESULT WHERE TEST_APPLY_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM TBL_TEST_APPLY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})
DELETE FROM TBL_TEST_APPLY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_USER_BADGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_NOTIFICATION WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_AI_CHAT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_INQUIRE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_REPORT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_CHAT_ROOM_REPORT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} OR CHAT_ROOM_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM TBL_CHAT_ROOM WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})
DELETE FROM TBL_CHAT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} OR CHAT_ROOM_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM TBL_CHAT_ROOM WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})
DELETE FROM TBL_CHAT_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} OR CHAT_ROOM_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM TBL_CHAT_ROOM WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})
DELETE FROM TBL_CHAT_ROOM WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_SETTING WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_SOCIAL_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
DELETE FROM TBL_USER WHERE ID = #{userId}
